def process_single_day(self, idx):
    """处理单日数据"""
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]

    # 加载当日分钟数据
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close'])

    if idx == 0:
        last_df = pd.DataFrame()
    else:
        last_df = self.last_close.iloc[[idx-1]]

    # 合并最后收盘价
    combined_df = pd.concat([
        last_df,
        data.to_dataframe('close')
    ])
    combined_df.index = combined_df.index.astype(str)
    combined_df.sort_index(inplace=True)
    # 计算收益率（避免除零错误）
    returns = combined_df.pct_change().iloc[1:]

    # 内层并行：计算所有股票的距离指标
    n_stocks = len(data.codes)
    fear_values = Parallel(n_jobs=-1, prefer='threads')(
        delayed(calculate_single_column)(returns, j)
        for j in range(n_stocks)
    )

    return pd.Series(fear_values, index=data.codes, name=pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15))

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    if idx < 20:
        return pd.Series(name = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15))

    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name), fields=['volume'])
    mu = self.last_mean.iloc[idx-20]
    vol = data.to_dataframe('volume')
    vol = (vol.div(mu.reindex(data.codes, axis=1), axis=1)).rank(axis=1, pct=True)
    res = vol.mean(axis=0) / vol.std(axis=0) + vol.kurt(axis=0)
    res.name = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    return res

core_formula:
def gmm_fit(data):
    flag = ~np.isnan(data)
    arr = data[flag]
    gmm = GaussianMixture(n_components=3, covariance_type='full')
    gmm.fit(arr.reshape(-1, 1))
    keys = gmm.weights_
    mu = gmm.means_.reshape(-1)
    sigma = np.sqrt(gmm.covariances_).reshape(-1)

    fluctuation_idx = np.argmax(keys)
    res = [keys[fluctuation_idx], mu[fluctuation_idx], sigma[fluctuation_idx]]

    up_idx = np.argmax(mu)
    if mu[up_idx] < 0 or mu[up_idx] - mu[fluctuation_idx] <= 1e-4:
        mu[up_idx] = 0
    res += [keys[up_idx], mu[up_idx], sigma[up_idx]]

    down_idx = np.argmin(mu)
    if mu[down_idx] > 0 or mu[fluctuation_idx] - mu[down_idx] <= 1e-4:
        mu[down_idx] = 0
    res += [keys[down_idx], mu[down_idx], sigma[down_idx]]
    return res

def cal_factors(data):
    data.columns = ['s_t', 'volume', 'turnover']
    data.sort_values(by='s_t', ascending=False, inplace=True)
    total_vol = data['volume'].sum()
    total_money = data['turnover'].sum()

    thd = total_vol * 0.2
    smart_vol = 0
    smart_money = 0
    for i in range(len(data)):
        smart_vol += data.iloc[i, 1]
        smart_money += data.iloc[i, 2]
        if smart_vol > thd:
            break
    vwap_smart = smart_money / smart_vol
    vwap = total_money / total_vol
    return [vwap_smart, vwap_smart / vwap]

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]

    # 加载当日分钟数据
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['volume']).to_dataframe('volume')

    vol_change = data.pct_change()
    vol_skew = vol_change.skew(axis=0)
    vol_kurt = vol_change.kurt(axis=0)

    cum_vol = data.cumsum(axis=0)
    cum_vol_mean = cum_vol.mean(axis=0)
    cum_vol_std = cum_vol.std(axis=0)

    log_vol = np.log(1 + data)
    log_vol_skew = log_vol.skew(axis=0)
    log_vol_kurt = log_vol.kurt(axis=0)

    log_vol_sum = log_vol.sum(axis=0)
    q = log_vol.quantile([0.1, 0.9])
    log_vol_tail10 = (log_vol * (log_vol < q.iloc[0])).sum(axis=0) / log_vol_sum
    log_vol_tail90 = (log_vol * (log_vol > q.iloc[1])).sum(axis=0) / log_vol_sum

    res = pd.concat([vol_skew, vol_kurt, cum_vol_std, cum_vol_mean, log_vol_kurt,
                     log_vol_skew, log_vol_tail90, log_vol_tail10], axis=1)
    res.columns = ['vol_skew', 'vol_kurt', 'cum_vol_std', 'cum_vol_mean', 'log_vol_kurt',
                   'log_vol_skew', 'log_vol_tail90', 'log_vol_tail10']
    res['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    res.index.name = 'code'
    return res.reset_index()
source_file: 2025-04-17_成交量分布中的alpha因子，来自兴证金工首席的研报.py

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    tmp_y = self.data.iloc[idx - 21:idx].dropna(how='all', axis=1)
    tmp_x = self.mkt_ret.iloc[idx - 21:idx]

    Y_full = tmp_y.dropna(axis=1)
    idx_full, Y_full = Y_full.columns, Y_full.values
    X_full = np.c_[np.ones((21, 1)), tmp_x.values]
    beta_full = np.linalg.pinv(X_full.T @ X_full) @ X_full.T @ Y_full
    r2 = compute_r_squared(X_full @ beta_full, Y_full)
    beta_full[2:, :] = 0
    new_r2 = compute_r_squared(X_full @ beta_full, Y_full)
    factor_full = pd.Series(data=1 - new_r2 / r2, index=idx_full, name=tmp_x.index[-1])

    factor_lack = {}
    for c in set(tmp_y.columns) - set(idx_full):
        lack_tmp_y = tmp_y.loc[:, [c]].copy()
        lack_tmp_y = lack_tmp_y.dropna()
        lack_tmp_x = tmp_x.reindex(lack_tmp_y.index)
        if len(lack_tmp_y) < 10:
            factor_lack[c] = np.nan
            continue
        X_lack = np.c_[np.ones(len(lack_tmp_y)), lack_tmp_x.values]
        Y_lack = lack_tmp_y.values
        beta_lack = np.linalg.pinv(X_lack.T @ X_lack) @ X_lack.T @ Y_lack
        r2 = compute_r_squared(X_lack @ beta_lack, Y_lack)[0]
        beta_lack[2:, :] = 0
        new_r2 = compute_r_squared(X_lack @ beta_lack, Y_lack)[0]
        factor_lack[c] = 1 - new_r2 / r2
    factor_lack = pd.Series(factor_lack, name=tmp_x.index[-1])
    return pd.concat([factor_full, factor_lack]).sort_index()
source_file: 2025-04-18_价格时滞，虽然效果不是太好，但是提供了一种全新的思路！.py

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]

    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close', 'volume'])

    res = (data.data[:, 0, :] * data.data[:, 1, :] / np.nansum(data.data[:, 1, :], axis=0, keepdims=True))
    res = np.nansum(res, axis=0) / np.nanmean(data.data[:, 0, :], axis=0)
    res = pd.Series(data=res, index=data.codes, name=pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15))
    return res

def cal_factors(data):
    close = data.iloc[-1, 0]
    high = np.nanmax(data.iloc[:, 0])
    low = np.nanmin(data.iloc[:, 0])

    data = data.groupby('close').sum()
    data.reset_index(inplace=True)

    vol = data['volume'].sum()
    vol_thd50 = vol * 0.5

    idx = np.argmax(data['volume'])
    data['diff'] = np.abs(data['close'] - data.iloc[idx, 0])
    data.sort_values(by=['diff', 'volume'], ascending=[True, False], inplace=True)
    
    cur_vol = 0
    for i in range(len(data)):
        cur_vol += data.iloc[i, 1]
        if cur_vol >= vol_thd50:
            data = data.iloc[:i + 1]
            break
    vsa_high = data['close'].max()
    vsa_low = data['close'].min()
    return [vsa_high / low, vsa_low / high, vsa_low / close]

def cal_factors(self, tar):

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]

    # 加载当日分钟数据
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close', 'open', 'volume', 'high', 'low'])
    dfs = data.to_dataframes()
    ret = dfs['close'] / dfs['open'] - 1

    high_idx = (dfs['high'].rank(pct=True, axis=0)).rolling(15).mean().idxmax().iloc[1:]
    low_idx = (dfs['low'].rank(pct=True, axis=0)).rolling(15).mean().idxmin().iloc[1:]
    diff_idx = high_idx - low_idx

    sigma = ret.rolling(15).std()
    vol = dfs['volume'].div(dfs['volume'].sum(axis=0), axis=1)
    vol = vol.rolling(15).sum()
    sigma = (pd.Series({col: sigma.loc[row, col] for col, row in high_idx.items()}) -
             pd.Series({col: sigma.loc[row, col] for col, row in low_idx.items()}))
    vol = (pd.Series({col: vol.loc[row, col] for col, row in high_idx.items()}) -
             pd.Series({col: vol.loc[row, col] for col, row in low_idx.items()}))
    res = pd.concat([diff_idx, sigma, vol], axis=1)
    res.columns = ['diff_idx', 'diff_std', 'diff_vol']
    res['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    res.index.name = 'code'

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['volume', 'close', 'open'])
    ret = np.log(data.to_dataframe('close') / data.to_dataframe('open'))
    vol = data.to_dataframe('volume')
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]

    thd = vol.quantile(0.1)
    flag = vol > thd
    rev_flag = np.where(flag, 1, np.nan)
    mom_flag = np.where(flag, np.nan, 1)

    rev_weights = vol * rev_flag
    rev_weights = rev_weights.div(rev_weights.sum(axis=0), axis=1)

    mom_weights = 1 / (vol * mom_flag)
    mom_weights = mom_weights.replace(np.inf, np.nan).replace(-np.inf, np.nan)
    mom_weights = mom_weights.div(mom_weights.sum(axis=0), axis=1)

    rev = (rev_weights * ret).sum(axis=0) - (mom_weights * ret).sum(axis=0)
    rev.name = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    return rev

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['volume', 'close', 'open', 'high', 'low'])
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]

    vol = data.to_dataframe('volume').iloc[2:-2]
    vol = vol.div(vol.sum(axis=0), axis=1)    
    ret = (data.to_dataframe('close') / data.to_dataframe('open')).iloc[2:-2] - 1
    amp = (data.to_dataframe('high') / data.to_dataframe('low')).iloc[2:-2] - 1

    rvc_cor = ret.corrwith(vol)
    rhl_cor = ret.corrwith(amp)

    flag = np.where(ret > 0, 1, np.nan)
    voh_cor = (ret * flag).corrwith(vol * flag)

    flag = np.where(flag==1, np.nan, 1)
    vol_cor = (ret * flag).corrwith(vol * flag)

    res = pd.concat([rvc_cor, rhl_cor, voh_cor, vol_cor], axis=1)
    res.columns = ['rvc_cor', 'rhl_cor', 'voh_cor', 'vol_cor']
    res['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    res.index.name = 'code'

keywords_from_index: 研报 / 收益率 / 自相关 / 相关性
core_formula:
def cal_factors(self, data):
    close, time_list = [], [0]
    thd = np.nansum(data[:, 0]) / 50
    if thd == 0:
        return [np.nan] * 2
    cur_vol, cur_close = 0, 0

    for i in range(len(data)):
        diff = thd - cur_vol
        if data[i, 0] is None:
            continue
        if diff - data[i, 0] <= 0.01:
            cur_close += data[i, 1] * diff / thd
            close.append(cur_close)
            cur_vol = (data[i, 0] - diff)
            time_list.append(i + 1)
            while thd - cur_vol <= 0.01:
                time_list.append(i+1)
                close.append(data[i, 1])
                cur_vol -= thd
            else:
                cur_close = cur_vol * data[i, 1] / thd
        else:
            cur_close += data[i, 0] * data[i, 1] / thd
            cur_vol += data[i, 0]
    time_list = np.diff(time_list)
    ret = np.diff(close) / np.array(close)[:-1] > 0
    ret = np.insert(ret, 0, close[0] > data[0, 1])
    bucket = np.where(ret, 1, -1) * time_list
    pos_prob = self.cal_entropy(bucket[bucket > 0], len(bucket))
    neg_prob = self.cal_entropy(np.abs(bucket[bucket < 0]), len(bucket))
    cutVol_entropy = -1 * (pos_prob + neg_prob)

    time_series = pd.Series(data=time_list)
    cutVol_timeCor = time_series.shift(1).corr(time_series)
    return cutVol_entropy, cutVol_timeCor

def cal_factors(x, y1, y2):
    flag1 = ~np.isnan(x) & ~np.isnan(y1)
    if not np.any(flag1):
        return [np.nan] * 4
    flag2 = ~np.isnan(x) & ~np.isnan(y2)
    x = np.digitize(x, np.linspace(np.nanmin(x), np.nanmax(x), 10))
    y1 = np.digitize(y1, np.linspace(np.nanmin(y1), np.nanmax(y1), 10))
    y2 = np.digitize(y2, np.linspace(np.nanmin(y2), np.nanmax(y2), 10))
    te_r2m, te_m2r, te_r2v, te_v2r = 0, 0, 0, 0
    for i in range(1, 4, 1):
        te_r2m += pyinform.transfer_entropy(x[flag1], y1[flag1], k=i)
        te_m2r += pyinform.transfer_entropy(y1[flag1], x[flag1], k=i)
        te_r2v += pyinform.transfer_entropy(x[flag2], y2[flag2], k=i)
        te_v2r += pyinform.transfer_entropy(y2[flag2], x[flag2], k=i)
    return [te_r2m / 3, te_m2r / 3, te_r2v / 3, te_v2r / 3]

def process_single_day(self, idx):

    file_name = self.files[idx]

    vol = data.to_dataframe('volume')

    money = data.to_dataframe('turnover')
    money = money.div(money.sum(axis=0), axis=1)
    ret = (data.to_dataframe('close') / data.to_dataframe('open')) - 1

    rtn_foc = ret.shift(1).corrwith(ret)
    vol_foc = vol.shift(1).corrwith(vol)
    money_foc = money.shift(1).corrwith(money)

    res = pd.concat([rtn_foc, vol_foc, money_foc, money_foc - vol_foc], axis=1)
    res.columns = ['rtn_foc', 'vol_foc', 'money_foc', 'diff']

    res.index.name = 'code'

def lr(data):
    x = data.iloc[:-1]
    y = data.iloc[1:]
    Y_full = y.dropna(axis=1)
    idx_full, Y_full = Y_full.columns, Y_full.values
    X_full = np.c_[np.ones((len(x), 1)), x.loc[:, idx_full].values]
    beta_full = np.linalg.pinv(X_full.T @ X_full) @ X_full.T @ Y_full
    resi = Y_full - X_full @ beta_full
    resi = pd.DataFrame(data=resi, columns=idx_full)

    for c in set(y.columns) - set(idx_full):
        y_lack = y.loc[:, c]
        x_lack = x.loc[:, c]
        idx = x_lack.dropna().index.intersection(y_lack.dropna().index)

        if len(idx) < 30:
            resi[c] = np.nan
            continue
        X_lack = x_lack.reindex(idx)
        Y_lack = y_lack.reindex(idx).values
        X_lack = np.c_[np.ones(len(X_lack)), X_lack.values]
        beta_lack = np.linalg.pinv(X_lack.T @ X_lack) @ X_lack.T @ Y_lack
        resi[c] = y_lack - np.c_[np.ones(len(x_lack)), x_lack.values] @ beta_lack
    return resi

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['volume', 'turnover'])
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]

    vol = data.to_dataframe('volume')
    money = data.to_dataframe('turnover')

    vol_cnt = (vol >= (vol.mean() + vol.std()))
    vol_cnt = (vol_cnt == True) * (vol_cnt.shift(1) == False)
    money_cnt = (money >= (money.mean() + money.std()))
    money_cnt = (money_cnt == True) * (money_cnt.shift(1) == False)

    res = [vol_cnt.sum(), money_cnt.sum()]
    res = pd.concat(res, axis=1)
    res.columns = ['vol_cnt', 'money_cnt']
    res['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    res.index.name = 'code'

def __call__(self):
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data('../../data/stock_bar_1day.parquet', fields=['close', 'high', 'low']
                                         ).to_dataframes()
    flag = data['close'] < data['close'].shift(21)
    anchor = data['high'].rolling(21).max() * flag + (1 - flag) * data['low'].rolling(21).min()
    res = data['close'] / anchor - 1
    res.index.name = 'datetime'
    res.reset_index(inplace=True)
    res = pd.melt(res, id_vars='datetime', var_name='code', value_name='anchoring_reverse')
    res.to_parquet('./anchoring_reverse.parquet')

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close'])
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]

    price = data.to_dataframe('close').diff()
    price_delay1 = price.shift(1)
    self_corr = price_delay1.corrwith(price)

    flag = (price > 0) * (price_delay1 > 0)
    self_corr_plus = price_delay1[flag].corrwith(price[flag])

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close', 'open', 'high', 'low', 'volume']).to_dataframes()
    close = np.abs(data['close'] - data['open'])
    high = data['high'] - data['low']
    total_vol = data['volume'].sum()
    res = []
    cols = []
    for thd in range(10, 110, 10):
        if thd < 100:
            flag = close <= thd * high / 100
        else:
            flag = close == high
        tmp_vol = data['volume'] * np.where(flag, 1, np.nan)
        res.append(tmp_vol.sum() / total_vol)
        cols.append('tcv_{}'.format(thd))
    res = pd.concat(res, axis=1)
    res.columns = cols
    res['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    res.index.name = 'code'
    return res.reset_index()

def process_single_day(self, idx):

    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]

    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close', 'open'])
    rtn = data.to_dataframe('close') / data.to_dataframe('open') - 1
    thd = rtn.quantile(0.9)
    rtn = 1 + (rtn * (rtn >= thd))
    rtn = rtn.fillna(1)
    rtn = rtn.cumprod()
    rtn = rtn.iloc[-1]
    rtn.name = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    return rtn

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    ret = self.ret.iloc[idx - 252:idx].dropna(how='all', axis=1)
    price = self.data.iloc[idx-1].dropna()
    ret = ret.reindex(price.index, axis=1)

    ret = ret.corr()
    ret.reset_index(inplace=True, drop=True)
    mask_matrix = np.eye(len(ret), dtype=bool)
    ret = ret.mask(mask_matrix)
    flag = ret > ret.quantile(1-10/len(ret))

    ref_price = price.values.reshape(-1, 1) * np.where(flag, 1, np.nan)
    ref_price = np.nanmean(ref_price, axis=0)
    price = np.log(price) - np.log(ref_price)
    return price

def cal_factors(close, max_flag, min_flag):
    flag = pd.concat([max_flag, min_flag], axis=1)
    flag = flag.replace(False, np.nan)
    flag.reset_index(inplace=True, drop=True)
    flag = flag.dropna(how='all')
    if len(flag) == 0:
        return np.nan
    start = flag.iloc[[0]].index.tolist()[0]
    if flag.iloc[0, 0]:
        tmp_flag = flag.iloc[:, 1].dropna()
    else:
        tmp_flag = flag.iloc[:, 0].dropna()
    if len(tmp_flag) == 0:
        return np.nan
    end = tmp_flag.iloc[[-1]].index.tolist()[0]
    intraday_mom = close.iloc[start] / close.iloc[end] - 1
    return intraday_mom

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close', 'open', 'volume']).to_dataframes()
    rtn = (data['close'] / data['open'] - 1).iloc[:235]
    vol = data['volume'].iloc[:235]
    vol_flag = vol > vol.mean() + vol.std()
    flag_pos = rtn > 0
    flag_neg = rtn < 0
    reverse_imp_pos = -1 * (rtn * np.where(vol_flag * flag_pos != 0, 1.0, np.nan)).mean()
    reverse_imp_neg = (rtn * np.where(vol_flag * flag_neg != 0, 1.0, np.nan)).mean()
    res = pd.concat([reverse_imp_pos, reverse_imp_neg, rtn.mean()], axis=1)
    res.columns = ['reverse_imp_pos', 'reverse_imp_neg', 'rtn']
    res['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    return res

def __cal_factors__(group):

def cal_factors(data):
    data = data.groupby('close').sum()

    tot_money = data['turnover'].sum()
    start = 0
    res = 0

        end = int(len(data) * q)
        tmp_group = data.iloc[start:end]

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['volume', 'turnover'])
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    vol = data.to_dataframe('volume')
    money = data.to_dataframe('turnover')
    vol = vol.div(vol.sum(), axis=1)
    money = money.div(money.sum(), axis=1)
    diff = vol - money
    corr = diff.corrwith(diff.shift(1))
    res = [diff.std(), diff.skew(), diff.kurt(), corr]
    res = pd.concat(res, axis=1)
    res.columns = ['std', 'skew', 'kurt', 'corr']
    res['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    res.index.name = 'code'
    return res.reset_index()

    data.reset_index(inplace=True)

def __call__(self):
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data('../../data/stock_bar_1day.parquet',
                                         fields=['high', 'low', 'close', 'open', 'turnover']).to_dataframes()
    sigma_normal = data['close'].pct_change().rolling(21).std()
    hl_ratio = data['high'] / data['low']
    co_ratio = data['close'] / data['open']
    hc_ratio = data['high'] / data['close']
    ho_ratio = data['high'] / data['open']
    lc_ratio = data['low'] / data['close']
    lo_ratio = data['low'] / data['open']
    sigma_p = np.sqrt((np.square(np.log(hl_ratio))).rolling(21).sum() / (84*np.log(2)))
    sigma_gk = np.sqrt((0.5 * np.square(np.log(hl_ratio)) -
                          (2 * np.log(2) - 1) * np.square(np.log(co_ratio))).rolling(21).mean())
    sigma_rs = (np.log(hc_ratio) * np.log(ho_ratio) +
                        np.log(lc_ratio) * np.log(lo_ratio)).rolling(21).mean()
    sigma_o = (np.log(data['open'] / data['close'].shift(1))).rolling(21).mean()

    gamma = np.power(np.log(high.rolling(2).max() / low.rolling(2).min()), 2)
    num = 3 - 2 * np.sqrt(2)
    alpha = (np.sqrt(2 * beta) - np.sqrt(beta)) / num - np.sqrt(gamma / num)
    res = (2 * np.exp(alpha - 1)) / (1 + np.exp(alpha))

def cal_factors(vol):
    q = vol.quantile([0.25, 0.75])
    med = q.median()
    iqr = q.iloc[-1] - q.iloc[0]
    vol = vol.clip(lower=med-3*iqr, upper=med+3*iqr)
    vol = vol - vol.mean()
    vol = vol * np.hanning(len(vol))
    fft_cf = np.fft.rfft(vol)
    p_f = np.square(np.abs(fft_cf))
    return np.sum(p_f[48:]) / np.sum(p_f[1:])

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close', 'open']).to_dataframes()
    rtn = (data['close'] / data['open'] - 1)
    up_flag = rtn > 0
    down_flag = rtn < 0
    t_list = np.arange(1, 241).reshape(-1, 1)
    gu = rtn * np.where(up_flag, 1, np.nan)
    gu = (gu * t_list).sum() / gu.sum()
    gd = rtn * np.where(down_flag, 1, np.nan)
    gd = (gd * t_list).sum() / gd.abs().sum()
    res = pd.concat([gu, gd], axis=1)
    res.columns = ['gu', 'gd']
    res = res.fillna(0)
    res['diff'] = res['gd'] - res['gu']
    res['dist'] = res['diff'].abs()
    res['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    return res

    imfs = emd(close, max_imf=3)
    snr_layer2 = snr_layer3 = None

        snr_layer3 = np.log(np.std(close - noise_layer3) / np.std(noise_layer3))
        noise_layer2 = np.sum(imfs[:2, :], axis=0)
        snr_layer2 = np.log(np.std(close - noise_layer2) / np.std(noise_layer2))
    elif len(imfs) == 3:

def __cal_beta__(data):
    y = data.iloc[:, 0].values
    if len(y) < 5:
        return [np.nan] * 3
    beta = []
    for i in range(2, 5):
        data['new'] = data.iloc[:, i] * np.sign(data.iloc[:, 0])
        x = data.iloc[:, [1, -1]].values
        x = np.c_[np.ones((len(data), 1)), x]
        beta_full = np.linalg.pinv(x.T @ x) @ x.T @ y
        beta.append(beta_full[2])
    return beta

                x2 = tmp.iloc[126:252].reset_index(drop=True)
                x3 = tmp.iloc[252:].reset_index(drop=True)
                corr = (x2[col].corr(x3[col]) + x1[col].corr(x2[col])) / 2
                res.append(corr)

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['volume', 'turnover',
                                                       'open', 'low', 'high', 'close']).to_dataframes()
    thick = ((data['high'] - data['low']) / data['open']) * data['turnover']
    thick = thick.ewm(span=9).mean()
    rift = 1 - (data['close'] - data['open']) / (data['high'] - data['low'] + 0.001)
    light = data['volume'] / data['volume'].ewm(span=21).mean() - 1
    direction = np.sign(data['close'] - data['open']) * (1 - 2 * rift)
    step = []
    for i in range(13, len(thick)+1):
        corr = thick.iloc[i-13:i].corrwith(light.iloc[i-13:i])
        step.append(corr)
    step = pd.concat(step, axis=1).T
    step.index = thick.index.tolist()[12:]
    step = step.reindex(direction.index.tolist())
    trend = light.rolling(8).std() / (thick.rolling(8).std() + 0.001)
    factor = step * np.exp(-direction) * (1 - np.tanh(light*trend)) * rift
    cols = ['thick', 'rift', 'light', 'direction', 'step', 'trend', 'factor']
    res = pd.DataFrame(columns=cols,index=factor.columns.tolist())
    for key in cols:
        res[key] = eval(key).mean()
    res['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    return res

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['turnover', 'close', 'volume'])
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    cur = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    if cur > pd.to_datetime('2026-01-01') or cur < pd.to_datetime('2005-01-01'):
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=['hcvol', 'lcvol', 'hcp', 'lcp'])
    factor = self.factor.loc[cur]
    factor = factor.reindex(data.codes)
    close = data.to_dataframe('close') * factor.values.reshape(1, -1)
    if self.last_close is not None:
        close = pd.concat([self.last_close, close])
        self.last_close = close.iloc[[-1]]
    flag_up = close.diff() > 0
    flag_dowm = close.diff() < 0
    money = data.to_dataframe('turnover')
    vol = data.to_dataframe('volume')
    tot_vol = vol.sum()
    vwap = money / vol
    end_close = data.to_dataframe('close').iloc[-1]
    buy_down = vwap * np.where(flag_up, 1.0, np.nan) > end_close
    sell_up = vwap * np.where(flag_dowm, 1.0, np.nan) < end_close
    hcvol = (buy_down * vol).sum()
    lcvol = (sell_up * vol).sum()
    hcp = ((buy_down * money).sum() / hcvol) / end_close - 1
    lcp = ((sell_up * money).sum() / lcvol) / end_close - 1
    res = pd.concat([hcvol / tot_vol, lcvol/ tot_vol, hcp, lcp], axis=1)
    res.columns = ['hcvol', 'lcvol', 'hcp', 'lcp']
    res['datetime'] = cur
    return res

def cal_factors(data):
    close = data.iloc[-1, 0]
    high = np.nanmax(data.iloc[:, 0])
    low = np.nanmin(data.iloc[:, 0])
    data['open'] = data['close'] / data['open'] - 1
    data = data.groupby('close').std()
    data.sort_index(inplace=True)
    data.reset_index(inplace=True)
    max_idx = np.argmax(data['open'])
    max_price = data.iloc[max_idx]['close']
    min_idx = np.argmin(data['open'])
    min_price = data.iloc[min_idx]['close']
    return [max_price / low, max_price / high, max_price / close,
            min_price / low, min_price / high, min_price / close, max_price / min_price]

        tk += self.v_func(val) * (self.w_minus((i+1) / l) - self.w_minus(i / l))
    for i in range(n):
        val = data.iloc[m+i]
        tk += self.v_func(val) * (self.w_plus((n - i + 1) / l) - self.w_plus((n - i) / l))
    return tk

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    cur_time = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    if idx < 243 or cur_time >= pd.to_datetime('2026-01-01'):
        return pd.Series(name=cur_time)
    close = []
    for i in range(idx - 20, idx + 1):
        file_name = self.files[i]
        full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
        data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close'])
        factor = self.factor.iloc[idx - 243].reindex(data.codes)
        close.append(data.to_dataframe('close') * factor.values.reshape(1, -1))
    his = pd.concat(close).pct_change()
    cur = his.iloc[-240:]
    his = (his - his.mean().values.reshape(1, -1))
    his = his / his.std().values.reshape(1, -1)
    cur = (cur - cur.mean().values.reshape(1, -1))
    cur = cur / cur.std().values.reshape(1, -1)
    res = cur.skew().to_frame()
    res.columns = ['skew']
    mmd = []
    for i in range(len(cur.columns)):
        tmp_cur = cur.iloc[:, i].dropna()
        if len(tmp_cur) < 120:
            mmd.append(np.nan)
        else:
            tmp_his = his.iloc[-240:, i].dropna()
            mmd.append(self.compute_mmd(tmp_cur.values, tmp_his.values))
    res['mmd'] = mmd
    res['datetime'] = cur_time
    return res

def cal_factors(tr, vwap, amt):
    tr = tr.shift(-1).fillna(0)
    tr.sort_index(ascending=False, inplace=True)
    tr = (1 - tr / 100).clip(lower=0, upper=1)
    tr = tr.cumprod()
    rsd_amt = (amt * tr).iloc[:-1]
    res = (vwap.iloc[:-1] * rsd_amt).sum() / rsd_amt.sum()
    return vwap.iloc[-1] / res

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    cur_time = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close', 'open', 'volume', 'turnover']).to_dataframes()
    rtn = data['close'] / data['open'] - 1
    rtn['mkt'] = rtn.mean(axis=1)
    prob = self.cal_prob(rtn, rtn['mkt'])
    thd = prob['mkt'].quantile(0.05)
    flag = (prob.iloc[:, :-1] < thd)
    res = flag.mean()
    res = res.to_frame()
    res.columns = ['anomaly_ratio']
    res['datetime'] = cur_time
    money = data['turnover'].shift(-4).dropna()
    vol = data['volume'].shift(-4).dropna()
    anomaly_vwap = (money * np.where(flag, 1.0, np.nan)
                    ).sum() / (vol * np.where(flag, 1.0, np.nan)).sum()
    norm_vwap = (money * np.where(flag, np.nan, 1.0)
                    ).sum() / (vol * np.where(flag, np.nan, 1.0)).sum()
    res['smart_money'] = anomaly_vwap / norm_vwap
    return res

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    vol = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path,
                                    fields=['volume']).to_dataframe('volume')
    start = vol.min()
    step = (vol.max() - start) / 10
    res = []
    for i in range(1, 11):
        end = start + step
        if i != 10:
            flag = (vol >= start) & (vol < end)
        else:
            flag = (vol >= start) & (vol <= end)
        res.append(flag.sum())
        start = end
    res = pd.concat(res, axis=1).T
    res = res / vol.count()
    res = res * np.log(res)
    res = -res.sum()
    res.name = pd.to_datetime(file_name.split('.')[0]) + timedelta(hours=15)
    return res

def __cal_factors__(self, data):
    data = data.dropna()
    if data.std() == 0:
        return 0
    if len(data) < 10:
        return np.nan  # 核密度估计至少需要10个样本
    # 2. 核密度估计（拟合 PDF）
    kde = gaussian_kde(data, bw_method='scott')
    # 3. 构建 x 轴网格（覆盖收益率主要分布区间）
    mu, sigma = data.mean(), data.std()
    x_min = mu - 3 * sigma
    x_max = mu + 3 * sigma
    x_grid = np.linspace(x_min, x_max, 1000)
    # 4. 计算网格上的 PDF 与 CDF
    pdf_grid = kde.evaluate(x_grid)  # PDF 值
    # 梯形法累积积分 → CDF
    dx = x_grid[1] - x_grid[0]
    cdf_grid = cumulative_trapezoid(pdf_grid, dx=dx, initial=0)
    cdf_grid = np.clip(cdf_grid, 0.0, 1.0)  # 数值截断
    # 5. 将原始收益率点映射到 CDF 曲线上
    pdf_xi = kde.evaluate(data)  # 每个 xi 处的 PDF 值
    cdf_xi = np.interp(data, x_grid, cdf_grid)  # 每个 xi 处的 CDF 值
    # 6. 计算相关系数 ρ[ PDF(xi), CDF(xi) ]
    r, _ = pearsonr(pdf_xi, cdf_xi)
    # 7. 最终因子 Asym = -ρ
    asym = -r
    return asym

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    cur_time = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close']).to_dataframes()
    rtn = data['close'].pct_change()
    mkt = rtn.mean(axis=1)
    var_rtn = rtn.quantile(0.05)
    var_mkt = mkt.quantile(0.05)
    tao_j = ((rtn < var_rtn) * (mkt < var_mkt).values.reshape(-1, 1)).mean()
    mkt = (-mkt).sort_values()
    alpha_m, cnt = 0, 0
    for i in range(1, len(mkt)):
        if mkt.iloc[-i] >= - var_mkt:
            cnt += 1
            alpha_m += np.log(1 + mkt.iloc[-i]) - np.log(1 - var_mkt)
    alpha_m = alpha_m / cnt
    tail_beta = tao_j ** alpha_m * var_rtn / var_mkt
    tail_beta.name=cur_time
    return tail_beta

def cal_factors(self, code, close, volume, factor, tr):
    data = pd.concat([close, volume], axis=1)
    data.columns = ['close', 'volume']
    data = data.groupby('close', as_index=False, group_keys=False).sum()
    last_data = self.last_chip.get(code, None)
    if last_data is None:
        data.iloc[:, -1] *= tr
    else:
        last_data['close'] /= factor
        data = data.merge(last_data, how='outer', on=['close'])
        data = data.fillna(0)
        data['volume'] = data.iloc[:, -1] * (1 - tr) + data.iloc[:, -2] * tr
        data = data[['close', 'volume']]
    chip_high = data['close'].iloc[data['volume'].argmax()]
    chip_low = data['close'].iloc[data['volume'].argmin()]
    diff = chip_high - chip_low

keywords_from_index: 研报 / 偏度

def cal_factors(self, code, close, volume, factor, tr):
    data = pd.concat([close, volume], axis=1)
    data.columns = ['close', 'volume']
    data = data.groupby('close', as_index=False, group_keys=False).sum()
    last_data = self.last_chip.get(code, None)
    if last_data is None:
        data.iloc[:, -1] *= tr
    else:
        last_data['close'] /= factor
        data = data.merge(last_data, how='outer', on=['close'])
        data = data.fillna(0)
        data['volume'] = data.iloc[:, -1] * (1 - tr) + data.iloc[:, -2] * tr
        data = data[['close', 'volume']]
    chip_high = data['close'].max()
    chip_low = data['close'].min()
    diff = chip_high - chip_low
    close = close.iloc[-1]
    weight = data['volume'] / data['volume'].sum()
    mean = np.average(data['close'], weights=weight)
    q = data['close'].quantile([0.05, 0.95, 0.15, 0.85, 0.25, 0.75])
    q_90 = q.iloc[1] - q.iloc[0]
    q_70 = q.iloc[3] - q.iloc[2]
    q_50 = q.iloc[5] - q.iloc[4]
    chip_distri1 = 2 * q_90 / (q.iloc[1] + q.iloc[0])
    chip_distri2 = q_90 / chip_high
    chip_distri3 = 2 * q_70 / (q.iloc[3] + q.iloc[2])
    chip_distri4 = q_70 / chip_high
    chip_distri5 = 2 * q_50 / (q.iloc[5] + q.iloc[4])
    chip_distri6 = q_50 / chip_high
    data.iloc[:, 0] *= factor
    self.last_chip[code] = data.copy()
    return ((close - mean) / diff, chip_high / chip_low - 1, (mean - chip_low) / diff,
            chip_distri1, chip_distri2, chip_distri3, chip_distri4, chip_distri5, chip_distri6)

def process_single_day(self, idx):
    # 加载当日分钟数据
    file_name = self.files[idx]
    date_str = file_name.split('.')[0]
    cur_time = pd.to_datetime(date_str) + timedelta(hours=15)
    full_path = os.path.join(self.file_pth, file_name)
    data = BaseDataLoader.load_data(full_path, fields=['close', 'open', 'volume']).to_dataframes()
    rtn = data['close'] / data['open'] - 1
    flag = (rtn > 0) & (rtn > rtn.mean() + rtn.std())
    sigma = (rtn * np.where(flag, 1.0, np.nan)).std()
    vol_mu = data['volume'].mean()
    sig_up_p_v_ratio = sigma * (data['volume'] * np.where(flag, 1.0, np.nan)).mean() / vol_mu
    sig_up_v_intraday_std = sigma * (data['volume'] * np.where(flag, 1.0, np.nan)).std() / vol_mu
    res = pd.concat([sig_up_p_v_ratio, sig_up_v_intraday_std], axis=1)
    res.columns = ['sig_up_p_v_ratio', 'sig_up_v_intraday_std']
    res['datetime'] = cur_time
    return res

author_ic_claim: 这个IC如果放在笔者复现过的一系列因子中，它的表现不值得一提。但是，在这篇研报中，看起来似乎是表现最好的了。
author_layer_claim: 这个分层回测的单调性并不是很完美，红线的净值超过了绿线，甚至有些阶段还超过了黄线。
keywords_from_index: 研报 / 偏度
core_formula:
def cal_factors(self, code, close, volume, factor, tr, high_price, low_price):
    data = pd.concat([close, volume], axis=1)
    data.columns = ['close', 'volume']
    data = data.groupby('close', as_index=False, group_keys=False).sum()
    last_data = self.last_chip.get(code, None)
    if last_data is None:
        data.iloc[:, -1] *= tr
    else:
        last_data['close'] /= factor
        data = data.merge(last_data, how='outer', on=['close'])
        data = data.fillna(0)
        data['volume'] = data.iloc[:, -1] * (1 - tr) + data.iloc[:, -2] * tr
        data = data[['close', 'volume']]
    tot_chip = data.iloc[:, 1].sum()
    asr = data[(data['close'] >= low_price) & (data['close'] < high_price)].iloc[:, 1].sum() / tot_chip
    asr_upper = data[(data['close'] >= close) & (data['close'] < high_price)].iloc[:, 1].sum() / tot_chip
    asr_lower = data[(data['close'] >= low_price) & (data['close'] < close)].iloc[:, 1].sum() / tot_chip
    asr_above = data[data['close'] >= high_price].iloc[:, 1].sum() / tot_chip
    asr_below = data[data['close'] < low_price].iloc[:, 1].sum() / tot_chip
    data.iloc[:, 0] *= factor
    self.last_chip[code] = data.copy()
    return asr, asr_upper, asr_lower, asr_above, asr_below
